extraction.one_line_summary: CAVENDISH Mark won bunch sprint after teams waited until crosswind section at 25km to go to race seriously following long headwind lull.
tactical_patterns: Israel Premier Tech controlled final right-hander 1200m out, bossing compression point where highway narrowed into corner.
Teams deliberately soft-pedaled block headwind until 25km turnaround, treating it like Sunday ride until crosswind exposure.
Quickstep Alpha stayed invisible until final moments while others positioned early, conserving riders in wind.

rider_signals.PHILLIPS Jasper: positive: held red jersey, confirmed running pace in headwind, emerged well positioned from final corner despite being screened
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: negative: boxed in at final corner despite being a protected sprinter, team positioning failed
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: positive: still in frame after chaotic 1200m corner compression, finished sprint decisively
rider_signals.MORKOV Michael: positive: leadout work explicitly praised by Cavendish for effectiveness in technical finish
rider_signals.STRZOK Morten: positive: collected maximum intermediate sprint points from break, building unbeatable black jersey lead despite breakaway futility
